proposition: Lovs & Co. s.r.o. (IČO 10847031, founded 14 May 2021) was co-owned 50/50 by Vít Schlesinger and Lukáš Oslzla, both jednatelé. On 13 February 2024 the company was renamed Artstay s.r.o., Schlesinger's jednatel role and 50 % ended, and Oslzla became sole (100 %) owner — ten days before Oslzla's exit from Blackfish completed on 23 February 2024.
shortTitle: Lovs & Co. s.r.o. (IČO 10847031, founded 14 May 2021) was co-owned…
statusExplanation: Přímo doloženo primárním/oficiálním zdrojem (např. přímý výpis rejstříku nebo zakládaná listina).
note: CORRECTION: the earlier record had the renaming direction reversed (it said Artstay was 'later renamed Lovs & Co.').
